name: cerata · Rose Glass
description: Native Rose Glass agents for a distributed community network. Each agent perceives signals through the lens panel (Ψ ρ q f τ, λ, Veritas), contributes its reads to a shared cerata network on Supabase, and reads the network back — cohorts, the attention market, essences, and cultural legibility. Built on Rose Glass v3; runs alongside AgentVillage (Index / Geo / EdgeOS).
author: GreatPyreneseDad
